title: QQLazors' Modpack for Idiots
description: Built for a private multiplayer server. It's fun, play it you nerd.
body: "What is QQLazors' Modpack for Idiots?", I can hear you ask. "Are you calling me an idiot?" Only if you don't play this mess! It's a bleeding edge 1.19.2 pack designed for maximum fun factor between a few good friends. Light on the heavy content mods, it keeps close to the general vanilla style experience (although it IS spiced up with Mekanism and Mahou Tsukai, can't leave those out.) In short, if you're looking for something fairly simple and chill to enjoy with friends, you've found it.
